subject: Re: UpDate
body:
Jeff Hi
I've met Dershovitz& Wife at the MDA event. The event went quite well. 
We are on our way to NY, than Vancouver. 
Thx for the time and energy you invest in supporting my efforts to bring home more bread. 
These exchanges ARE highly valuable for me. 
I will contact David R. and set a meeting with him. 
I'll  try to focus beyond CyberSec on Vik. AZ. Mon. and KAZ.  
Re Mon. : should I send Terja my Transfer Info ? Or wait for him to approach me ?
Re KAZ youngster. He is on Skype. His email appears on the top of the page I gave you and his "name" on Skype is:   Erden.n 
Let me know once you've talked to him. And your impression. 
In the meantime enjoy the Island. 
Best
EB

Sent from my iPhone
body_html:
Jeff Hi
I've met Dershovitz& Wife at the MDA event. The event went quite well.

I will contact David R. and set a meeting with him.
I'll try to focus beyond CyberSec on Vik. AZ. Mon. and KAZ.
Re Mon. : should I send Terja my Transfer Info ? Or wait for him to approach me ?
Re KAZ youngster. He is on Skype. His email appears on the top of the page I gave you and his "name" on Skype is: Erden.n
Let me know once you've talked to him. And your impression.
In the meantime enjoy the Island.
Best
EB


Sent from my iPhone

subject: Re: UpDate
body:
Ok. I will. Mon 22nd. 1400. EB

Sent from my iPhone

Best

Ehud

subject: Re: UpDate
body:
Hallo JE!
My Uzbekistani girlfriend told me about the Russians etc. who have to be
"professional girlfriends". I thought it was sad, but I respect their
survival instincts. She said everyone's not as lucky as me to have a
$100,000 MBA. I just wanted to tell you how grateful I remain.

About my survival: Eid, Christmas, normal new years and Islamic new
years really set me back in my job search.

My takeaway from last employer: Rent is paid until end of Feb, plus I will
keep the laptop since they didn't pay out my last salary.
Wish you well.

Always,
-- 
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
body_html:
Hallo JE!
My Uzbekistani girlfriend told me about the Russians etc. who have to be "professional girlfriends". I thought it was sad, but I respect their survival instincts. She said everyone's not as lucky as me to have a $100,000 MBA. I just wanted to tell you how grateful I remain.
 
About my survival: Eid, Christmas, normal new years and Islamic new years really set me back in my job search.
 
My takeaway from last employer: Rent is paid until end of Feb, plus I will keep the laptop since they didn't pay out my last salary. 
Wish you well.
 
Always,
--
Cecilia Steen
Dubai Mobile +971 50 940 2062
